meta.footEn: Data snapshot: 2026-06-14 · Garmin fenix 8 via Freddy

en.c5d: computed from sleep, HRV, RHR, stress & recent load
en.rec: Strong rebound: 7h45 (score 86) after Saturday's short 6h04. Deep sleep hit 2h04 and REM recovered to 1h44 after Saturday's thin 50m. RHR holds at the week-low 52, stress fell to 15 (calmest of the week), and HRV is 43 — just off yesterday's 45 but +4 over the 7-day baseline (39). Only blemish was 31m awake. Coming off the trap-bar deadlift, every recovery marker is green — keep today easy and refuel.

hr.c5d: izračunato iz sna, HRV-a, RHR-a, stresa i opterećenja
hr.rec: Snažan oporavak: 7h45 (ocjena 86) nakon subotnjih kratkih 6h04. Duboki san dosegao 2h04, a REM se oporavio na 1h44 nakon subotnjih tankih 50m. RHR ostaje na tjednom minimumu 52, stres pao na 15 (najmirniji u tjednu), a HRV je 43 — tek ispod jučerašnjih 45 ali +4 iznad 7-dnevne osnovice (39). Jedina mrlja bila je 31m budnosti. Nakon trap-bar mrtvog dizanja, svi pokazatelji oporavka su zeleni — neka danas bude lagano i nadoknadi gorivo.
